---
title: "data-cleaning"
output: html_document
---
# load packages
```{r}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, lubridate)
```

# load data
```{r}
data <- read_csv("../data/output/combined_hcris_mcaid.csv")
data
```

# isolate 2014 adopters
```{r}
# filter out post-2014 adopters
adopters_2014 <- data %>% 
  filter(expanded == 0 | date_adopted <= ymd("2014-12-31"))
```

# make DD dataset for 2014 adopters vs. no adoption
```{r}
reg_2014_dataset <- adopters_2014 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(tot_uncomp_care_charges)) %>%
  mutate(
    post = (year >=2014),
    treat = post * expanded
  )
```
